summary: Upgraded android-extractor.py to v0.1.2 and updated android-accuracy-validator.py. Drift dropped from 250 → 79 (target: <100). Four bugs fixed in the extractor.

changes.description: Bumped EXTRACTOR_VERSION to '0.1.2'. Fixed four bugs: (1) enum entry condition (was depth+1, should be depth); (2) multi-line type declaration handling via pending_type mechanism — prevents premature popping during constructor param lines; (3) pending_type activation ordering — check for new type declaration BEFORE checking for '{' so sibling types aren't nested inside leaf pending types; (4) moved brace-depth pop check BEFORE pending_type handler so '}' lines always pop closed scopes even when a pending_type is active (fixes AmityInvitation.TargetType capture). Also: replaced single KT_ENUM_ENTRY_RE.match with re.finditer to capture multiple UPPER_SNAKE entries per line (e.g. BUSINESS_ERROR, UNAUTHORIZED_ERROR on same line). Added Java enum entry detection. Added enum_entries_total stat.

Added lookup_path() function handling 2-level (TypeName.member), 3-level (TypeName.NestedType.member), and 3-level-via-nested_types (TypeName.NestedType.InnerType) refs. Updated build_type_member_regex to capture full dotted suffix (not just single segment). Updated scan_block to split the captured suffix and delegate to lookup_path.

Regenerated. Stats: 975 types, 71 interfaces, 5276 members, 404 enum_entries. Key improvements: AmityError now has BUSINESS_ERROR/UNAUTHORIZED_ERROR/ITEM_NOT_FOUND/PERMISSION_DENIED etc.; AmityImage.Size has SMALL/MEDIUM/LARGE; AmityRolesFilter has All and ONLY as proper siblings (not nested); AmityInvitation.TargetType with COMMUNITY/ROOM/UNKNOWN now captured.

Regenerated. total_issues: 79 (was 250). 28 files with issues. Remaining 79 issues are real documentation drift (fabricated API names, wrong method names, wrong capitalization) that require doc edits — not extractor gaps.

remaining_drift_notes: Top remaining refs are genuine doc drift: AmityCommentRepository.get (×5, should be getComment), AmityPostRepository.Builder (×5, fabricated), AmityException.PermissionDenied/NotFound/InvalidParameter (fabricated nested exception classes), AmityContentFlagReason.OTHERS/HARASSMENT_OR_BULLYING (wrong case — SDK uses PascalCase: Others, HarassmentOrBullying), AmityRoomRepository.getBroadcastData (×3, should be getBroadcasterData), AmityRoomRepository.stop (×3, should be stopRoom).
